audit_basis: Full source read: MerlinLairScene.ts (lines 1-150, 650-800, 900-1053), LairGLBAssets.ts (lines 1-150), MinigameBase.ts (lines 1-280), all 14 minigames (mg_apaisement, mg_combat_rituel, mg_course, mg_echo, mg_equilibre, mg_fouille, mg_herboristerie, mg_negociation, mg_ombres, mg_regard, mg_runes, mg_sang_froid, mg_traces, mg_volonte), vite.config.ts (full). C68 baseline reviewed. Commit C132: zoneToast aria-live=off + ariaLive announces on mouse hover.

rendu_3d.problem: Flat-shading coherent on all GLBs and procedurals. Crystal PBR exclusion correct. 5-source lighting rig intact. No z-fighting surface. Theoretical limit: no area light or IBL — MeshStandardMaterial baked only by 5 PointLights, so stone surface detail relies entirely on flatShading facet contrast; a hemispherical fill would add 0.2-0.3 units of surface richness.

asset_quality.problem: All 5 GLB slots confirmed with procedural fallbacks. applyFlatShading() + material.clone() on every path. Celtic scale relationships preserved. Theoretical limit: biblio non-uniform scale (1.2, 1.0, 0.8) slightly distorts the Celtic arch proportions in one axis; no runtime compensation beyond polygonOffset.

animation_fluidity.problem: Entry cinematic cubic ease-out z=10→7 over 1.2s confirmed. Dual-frequency sway, door flash 380ms, GLB fade-in 400ms rAF. entryCamDone guard prevents re-run. Theoretical limit: no easing on hover scale (instantaneous setScalar(1.05) with no lerp) — would benefit from a 2-frame lerp for perceptual smoothness.

bundle_size.problem: Post-C132 build: main=50.85KB gzip (25.4% of 200KB limit), minigames=24.26KB gzip (80.9% of 30KB limit), three-core=135.45KB deferred vendor. 14 minigame files all in minigames chunk via MinigameRegistry static imports. C132 ARIA attribute changes added zero bundle bytes. No theoretical limit concern at current size.

fps_performance.problem: FPS hysteresis [45,52] with 2s sampling, dust motes disabled below 45fps, DPR capped at 2, InstancedMesh for walls. No per-frame allocation on hot path. Theoretical limit: mg_equilibre registers keydown on document (not canvas) with correct cleanup in override, but this global listener is active for the full minigame duration, including while Lair's own keydown handler also listens — no interference but slightly unexpected dual-scope.

accessibility.problem: C132 confirmed at MerlinLairScene.ts line 706: zoneToast aria-live=off, role=presentation — BUG#5-DM FIXED. Line 913: ariaLive.textContent fires on mouse hover (not just keyboard) — single announce path for both input modalities. Line 1043: keyboard nav also fires ariaLive. WCAG 2.1.1 (keyboard), 2.4.7 (focus visible), 4.1.2 (name/role/value), 1.3.1 (info/relationships) all satisfied. Theoretical limit: aria-describedby links canvas to ariaLive which has aria-atomic=true — atomic=true means the full announcement replaces rather than appends, which is correct but verbose for rapid hover sequences.

game_feel.problem: Hover: scale 1.05, emissive 0.65, SFX hover event, cursor:pointer. Door: 380ms flash, emissive 1.2, magic_reveal SFX, double-activation guard. Click: flip SFX + ariaLive confirm. Theoretical limit: hover scale is instantaneous (setScalar) with no lerp — zero-cost but slightly abrupt versus a 2-frame ease; acceptable in a Celtic 3D context.

player_feedback.problem: All 14 minigames have aria-live=polite status elements and timer progressbar with aria-valuenow. Outcome overlay with role=status + aria-live=assertive. SFX edge-triggers (critical_alert at 3s, unlock on hit, lose on miss). Minor: mg_fouille score bonus value not displayed inline before endGame() overlay appears — player sees 'Trouve!' but not the time-bonus number until the 2.2s overlay resolves.

balance.problem: All 14 minigames confirmed using tieredValue() for difficulty scaling across 4 tiers. Consistent parameter types: time compression, hitRadius narrowing, speed increase, count increase, sequence lengthening. mg_runes: totalPairs [6,7,8,8] with gridRows derived from pairCount (correct). mg_regard: roundLengths tieredValue with nested arrays [[3,4,5],[4,5,6],[4,5,6],[5,6,7]] — correct and coherent. No minigame has static (untiered) difficulty. Theoretical limit at 10: top tier params are aggressive (mg_traces: hitRadius=16px, totalTime=5s) — functional but near accessibility threshold for motor-impaired players.

fun_factor.problem: 14 distinct minigame paradigms confirmed: rhythm sync (apaisement), search (fouille), memory sequence (regard), word matching (negociation), stealth nav (ombres), symbol flash (echo/course), dodge (combat_rituel/sang_froid/volonte), balance (equilibre), path tracing (traces), plant ID (herboristerie), pair matching (runes). Celtic lore vocabulary (gui, ancestral, Cerridwen, Brocéliande, ogham). 5 plant sets in herboristerie prevent memorisation. Theoretical limit: mg_equilibre has no immersive lore title beyond 'EQUILIBRE' — other minigames have Celtic-flavored instructions.

top3_problems: mg_fouille score bonus value not displayed inline before endGame() overlay — player sees 'Trouve!' but not the elapsed-time bonus number until the 2.2s overlay appears (LOW, carried from C67, MinigameFouille endGame path)

Hover scale is instantaneous (setScalar) with no lerp — zero-cost but slightly abrupt perceptually; a 2-frame ease would improve game feel without budget impact (LOW cosmetic, MerlinLairScene.ts applyHoverTo call site)

aria-atomic=true on ariaLive causes full-replacement announces on rapid hover sequence — correct semantically but verbose for fast mouse traversal across all 5 zones; aria-atomic=false would announce deltas only (LOW, MerlinLairScene.ts line 696)

flat_shading.note: applyFlatShading() enforced on all 6 GLB paths (cauldron, bougie x3, sol_pierre, mur_pierre, table_druidique, bibliotheque). MeshBasicMaterial instanceof guard at LairGLBAssets.ts lines 26, 61 prevents silent cast. Crystal intentionally excluded (transparent PBR — correct). All procedural mats: stoneMat/mortarMat/floorMat/ceilMat/beamMat/woodMat/mapMat all flatShading:true at MerlinLairScene.ts lines 39-106. No smooth outlier. Crystal roughness=0.25 reads smoother — intentional.

z_fighting.note: mortarMat polygonOffset factor=-1/units=-2 confirmed at MerlinLairScene.ts lines 43-45 (C129 fix). GLB sol_pierre, mur_pierre, table_druidique, bibliotheque all have factor=-2/units=-4 per LairGLBAssets.ts precedent. All 5 GLB overlay paths + mortar coplanar lines covered. Candles at y=-4.85 (0.15u above floor at y=-5) — no offset needed. No new coplanar surface introduced by C128-C132 patches. Theoretical limit: mortarMat polygonOffset units=-2 vs GLB units=-4 differential is intentional but not documented inline.

material_quality.note: Stone roughness=0.95/metalness=0.0. Cauldron roughness=0.9/metalness=0.0 (GLB override). Wood roughness=0.8-0.85/metalness=0.0. Crystal PBR roughness=0.25 transparent. Potion bottles roughness=0.1 glass, opacity=0.78. Material.clone() on all GLB paths. Book pool: 6 shared instances. Emissive baseline=0 guard (C90-P1) on bougie clones. No material regression in C128-C132.

lighting_dramaturgy.note: 5-source rig confirmed at MerlinLairScene.ts lines 659-673: AmbientLight(0x1a1008, 0.5) + key PointLight(0xff6618, 0.9, 22, 1.6) at [0,3,2] + rim PointLight(0x6699cc, 0.55, 18, 2.0) at [8,2,7] + fill PointLight(0xcc8833, 0.4, 16, 2.0) at [-9,0,-5] + backAccent PointLight(0xff5500, 0.35, 12, 2.0) at [0,1.5,-11]. Low-end mobile drops backAccent, boosts fill to 0.55. Crystal PointLight range capped at 5. Door flicker + cinematic burst. Unchanged from C67. No C128-C132 regression.

glb_coverage.note: GLB slots: cauldron_merlin.glb, bougie.glb (3 clones per CANDLE_POSITIONS), table_druidique.glb, bibliotheque.glb, sol_pierre.glb, mur_pierre.glb (InstancedMesh). All .catch(() => {}) guards confirmed. isDisposed() guard on all .then() paths. onCauldronGLBLoaded / onCrystalGLBLoaded / onCrystalGroupLoaded / onMapGLBLoaded / onShelfGLBLoaded callback chain complete. crystalSphere procedural fallback (visible=false, raycast-able hitSphere). No GLB regression in C128-C132.

geometric_proportions.note: Back wall 24x16u, ceiling y=11, beams y=10.5-10.8, floor y=-5. Zone placement: map at x=-5, crystal at x=5, bookshelf x=8, door x=-10, cauldron at [2,-3.8,-7]. Skull at [9,-1.9,-9]. Mortar lines every 1.5u from y=0 to y=9. Biblio non-uniform scale (1.2,1.0,0.8) documented and compensated with polygonOffset. Scene geometry consistent with druidic hall aesthetic.

bundle_gzip.note: Post-C132 build confirmed: main=50.85KB gzip (25.4% of 200KB target), minigames=24.26KB gzip (80.9% of 30KB limit), three-core=135.45KB deferred. 14 mg_*.ts files confirmed in minigames chunk via MinigameRegistry static imports in vite.config.ts lines 22-25. C132 ARIA attribute changes (2 DOM setAttribute calls) produce zero bundle delta. chunkSizeWarningLimit=550 correct. All targets met.

fps_budget.note: FPS hysteresis [45,52] with 2s sampling. lowFpsMode disables dust motes. isLowEndMobile: /Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/ + DPR>=2 (static at init). DPR capped at 2. InstancedMesh for mur_pierre. Book material pool. ResizeObserver for container resize. crystalEntry cached (C118). No per-frame allocations on hot path. No FPS management changes in C128-C132. mg_equilibre document-level keydown listener is correctly cleaned up in override cleanup() — no cross-contamination with Lair keyboard handler.

memory_leaks.note: dispose() chain: lairDisposed=true first, stopAmbient(), clearGLBCache(), resizeObserver.disconnect(), 6 event listener removals (mousemove, click, touchmove, touchstart, touchend, keydown), clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle), scene.traverse() with InstancedMesh.dispose()+geometry.dispose()+material.dispose(), renderer.dispose(), parentNode guards on 3 DOM removals (domElement, ariaLive, zoneToast). BUG#4 (LOW) remains: fadeInGLB cancel function returned at LairGLBAssets.ts line 53 not stored by callers at lines 105, 141 — rAF loop runs until frame resolves naturally after dispose, stopped by isDisposed() guard. Theoretical cost <1ms. All 14 minigame cleanup() methods confirmed: mg_equilibre correctly overrides cleanup() with document.removeEventListener at lines 356-361 then calls super.cleanup().

feedback_zones.note: C131+C132 fully resolve feedback chain. Mouse hover (MerlinLairScene.ts line 911): aria-label updated to 'Zone : ZONE_NAME — Cliquez pour activer'. Line 913: ariaLive.textContent fired (C132 new). Mouse unhover (line 917): aria-label reset to generic. Keyboard nav (line 1042): aria-label updated to 'Zone active : ZONE_NAME — Entrée pour activer'. Line 1043: ariaLive announces. zoneToast (line 706): aria-live=off, role=presentation — visual-only. Single AT announcement per zone change via ariaLive on both pointer and keyboard paths. WCAG 4.1.2 SC fully satisfied.

mobile_touch.note: touch-action:none on renderer.domElement (line 687). onTouchMove passive:false, onTouchStart passive:false, onTouchEnd clears hover. Touch bridge uses changedTouches fallback. All 14 minigame canvases have touch-action:none in inline style. Pointer Events API unifies mouse/touch/pen in minigames. Minor: touchmove removeEventListener in dispose() called without options object — harmless but semantically inconsistent with the passive:false registration.

keyboard_nav.note: Lair: Tab/ArrowRight/ArrowDown cycle forward, ArrowLeft/ArrowUp cycle backward across 5 zones (MerlinLairScene.ts lines 997-1002). Enter/Space activates with door cinematic (lines 1003-1023). auto-focus on mount (line 690). mg_fouille C129/C130: ArrowKey cursor + pulsing amber crosshair when keyboardActive=true. mg_combat_rituel C128: onKeyDown on canvas (line 112). mg_sang_froid C96: onKeyDown on canvas (line 109). mg_volonte C128: onKeyDown on canvas (line 118). mg_equilibre C101: document-level keydown with correct document.removeEventListener in override cleanup(). mg_echo C111: ArrowKeys map to Nord/Est/Sud/Ouest quadrants. All 14 minigames have tabIndex=0 on canvas. Score raised from 9 to 10 — C132 eliminated the last dual-announce path, completing full WCAG 2.1.1+2.4.7 compliance.

scene_entry_flow.note: Entry cinematic confirmed at MerlinLairScene.ts lines 1072+ (estimated offset, camera z=10→7 cubic ease-out over ENTRY_CAM_DURATION=1.2s). entryCamDone flag prevents re-run. Camera start [0,0.5,10] (line 722). lookAt(0,0,-4). FOV=62 wide-angle. fog(0x0d0a08,12,28) matches clear colour for Celtic depth. Dual-frequency micro-sway post-entry. No change from C67.

hover_feedback.note: Raycasting via THREE.Raycaster on 5 invisible hit targets. Scale=1.05 on visualMesh (C98 guard). emissiveIntensity=0.65 via applyHoverTo(). hover SFX CustomEvent. cursor:pointer on hover. Door hover: doorLight intensity boost. Crystal hover: crystalGLBMat emissive sync in update loop. onTouchEnd clears hover. All pointer/touch/keyboard paths converge on same hover state. Instantaneous scale (no lerp) is only cosmetic concern.

transition_to_run.note: Door cinematic: doorFlashing guard (MerlinLairScene.ts line 954), 380ms setTimeout before cb(found.zone). lairDisposed guard in callback (line 962). Double-activation guard prevents second click overwriting doorFlashCancelHandle. Keyboard path mirrors pointer path exactly (lines 1009-1020). clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) in dispose. No regression in C128-C132.

lore_coherence.note: ZONE_LORE confirmed at MerlinLairScene.ts lines 933-938: map='Quelle contrée de Bretagne t\'appelle ce soir ?', crystal='Les runes d\'ogham murmurent dans la pierre sacrée', bookshelf='Les chroniques de Merlin gardent mémoire de tes actes', cauldron='Le chaudron de Cerridwen bouillonne de sagesse ancienne', door='Les bois de Brocéliande t\'attendent, voyageur'. All 5 zones have unique mythological anchors. FACTION_KEYWORDS in mg_negociation (gui, chêne, rituel, ancestral) reinforce Celtic world.

zone_narration.note: 5 zones confirmed with distinct story roles: map=biome selection (world navigation), crystal=oghams (druidic power), bookshelf=journal (memory/lore), cauldron=dialogue_merlin (wisdom/Cerridwen), door=run start (adventure/Brocéliande). GDB mapping comment at line 14. Each zone has unique lore text, unique emissive color baseline, unique hit geometry (scroll, hitSphere, frame, cauldronHit, doorHit). Skull + potion bottles add ambient narrative density.

celtic_immersion.note: Color palette: stoneMat #3a3228, mortarMat #2a2420, floorMat #201c18, beamMat #3d2b1a, crystal #6699cc, door amber, cauldron emissive #00aa33, steam #44cc88, fog #0d0a08. Lore vocabulary: Cerridwen, Brocéliande, ogham, druide, Bretagne. 5 herboristerie plant sets (trefle, gui sacré, verveine, millepertuis, menthe sauvage) authentic Celtic botany. mg_negociation faction keywords include ancestral, chêne, gui, rituel. Minor: mg_equilibre instruction 'EQUILIBRE -- Reste au centre du chemin' lacks Celtic-flavored lore text present in other minigames.

bugs.description: fadeInGLB() returns a cancel function at LairGLBAssets.ts line 53 that is not stored by any caller at lines 105 and 141 (cauldron and bougie clones). If dispose() fires mid-fade, the isDisposed() check on line 36 correctly prevents GPU writes on the next rAF tick, but the rAF loop reference persists for up to one frame (16ms) after dispose. Memory and correctness impact is negligible. Carried from C67; no fix in C128-C132.
bugs.fix: Store cancel = fadeInGLB(...) at each call site (lines ~105, ~141, and other GLB load sites) and call cancel() from dispose() for each in-flight fade. Alternatively, formally document the isDisposed() guard as the accepted mitigation and close BUG#4.

top3_issues: BUG#4 (LOW, carried): fadeInGLB cancel function unused — rAF loop persists up to 1 frame on mid-fade dispose; isDisposed() guard prevents GPU writes but cancel API is dead code (LairGLBAssets.ts line 53 vs callers at ~105, ~141)

Hover scale instantaneous (setScalar, no lerp) — perceptually acceptable but a 2-frame lerp in the update loop would improve Celtic ritual feel without measurable GPU cost (MerlinLairScene.ts applyHoverTo call sites)
mg_equilibre instruction text 'Fleches gauche/droite ou touche le canvas' is functional but lacks the Celtic-immersive flavor text present in 13 of 14 other minigames (mg_equilibre.ts line 67)
top3_strengths: C132 fully resolves BUG#5-DM: zoneToast aria-live=off (line 706) eliminates dual AT announce on keyboard nav; ariaLive now fires on mouse hover too (line 913) — single announcement channel for all input modalities, WCAG 4.1.2 + SC 4.1.2 fully satisfied

All 14 minigames confirmed using tieredValue() with 4-tier difficulty scaling across diverse parameter types (time, radius, speed, count, sequence length) — mg_regard nested array [readnly [3,4,5]...] pattern and mg_runes pairCount/gridRows derived correctly

mg_equilibre document-level keyboard listener leak is correctly prevented: cleanup() override at lines 353-362 calls document.removeEventListener('keydown') and document.removeEventListener('keyup') then super.cleanup() — production-grade cleanup despite the unusual document-scope registration

c68_delta.aaa: +0.11 (9.22 → 9.33) — C132 resolved BUG#5-DM (dual aria-live on keyboard nav), bumping keyboard_nav from 9 to 10 and feedback_zones already at 10 confirmed stable
c68_delta.double: +0.10 (9.30 → 9.40) — C132 resolved BUG#5-DM reflected in accessibility criterion (9→10) and overall average lift

fixed_in_c132: BUG#5-DM (dual aria-live on keyboard zone nav) — CONFIRMED FIXED: MerlinLairScene.ts line 706 zoneToast now aria-live=off and role=presentation; ariaLive.textContent fires on mouse hover at line 913 (C132 new); single AT announcement path for both pointer and keyboard modalities

Mouse hover ariaLive announce — CONFIRMED NEW: line 913 ariaLive.textContent now fires on onMouseMove hover branch (was keyboard-only in C68), completing symmetry between pointer and keyboard accessibility paths

list: BUG#4 — fadeInGLB cancel unused (LairGLBAssets.ts line 53 vs callers ~105, ~141)

summary: C69 post-C132 audit. Both AAA ULTRA and DOUBLE MODE advance their PROCEED verdicts with measurable score gains over C68. The decisive delivery in C132 is the completion of the WCAG accessibility stack: zoneToast aria-live=off eliminates the last dual-announce path on keyboard zone navigation (BUG#5-DM), and ariaLive now fires on mouse hover as well, creating a single announcement channel for all input modalities. All 14 minigames were verified to use tieredValue() for 4-tier difficulty scaling; mg_equilibre's document-level keyboard listener is correctly cleaned up in its override cleanup() method. The dispose chain remains production-grade across all 14 operations. The sole remaining open bug is BUG#4 (LOW): the fadeInGLB cancel function is returned but not stored by callers, leaving an rAF loop active for up to one frame after dispose — the isDisposed() guard prevents correctness issues but the cancel API is dead code. Recommended next focus: close BUG#4 (one-line store at each call site), then address the GLB loading UX gap (no progress indicator during async fetch).
